title: Material Replacement Cost Comparator
description: Industrial-grade tool to compare total cost of ownership and operational impact of replacing a current material with an alternative, incorporating quality, logistics, and risk factors.

inputs.label: Current Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit for the current material.

inputs.label: Alternative Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit for the alternative material.

inputs.label: Annual Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced or purchased per year.

inputs.label: Current Scrap Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with current material.

inputs.label: Alternative Scrap Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with alternative material.

inputs.label: Current Logistics Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for current material.

inputs.label: Alternative Logistics Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for alternative material.

inputs.label: One-time Changeover Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to retool, test, and qualify the alternative material.

inputs.label: Quality Impact on Downstream
inputs.businessContext: Expected impact of material change on downstream rework or quality issues.

inputs.label: Alternative Supplier Reliability
inputs.businessContext: Historical on-time delivery performance of the alternative supplier.

inputs.label: Currency Risk Factor
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual currency fluctuation risk if sourcing from different region.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of unit cost (WERC standard).

inputs.label: Current Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Average lead time for current material.

inputs.label: Alternative Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Average lead time for alternative material.

rules.condition: scrap_rate_current >= 0 AND scrap_rate_current <= 100 AND scrap_rate_alternative >= 0 AND scrap_rate_alternative <= 100
rules.message: Scrap rates must be between 0 and 100.
Annual volume must be greater than zero.

thresholds.alert: The alternative material results in a net cost increase. Reconsider replacement.
Alternative scrap rate exceeds 10% – high quality risk.
Alternative supplier reliability is poor – consider supply chain risk.
Currency risk above 5% – financial exposure significant.

formulas.label: Annual Material Cost (Current)
formulas.description: Total direct material cost per year for current material.

formulas.label: Annual Material Cost (Alternative)
formulas.description: Total direct material cost per year for alternative material.

formulas.label: Annual Scrap Cost (Current)
formulas.description: Cost of scrapped units due to defects with current material.

formulas.label: Annual Scrap Cost (Alternative)
formulas.description: Cost of scrapped units due to defects with alternative material.

formulas.label: Annual Logistics Cost (Current)
formulas.description: Total logistics cost per year for current material.

formulas.label: Annual Logistics Cost (Alternative)
formulas.description: Total logistics cost per year for alternative material.

formulas.label: Annual Inventory Holding Cost (Current)
formulas.description: Cost to hold average inventory of current material based on lead time.

formulas.label: Annual Inventory Holding Cost (Alternative)
formulas.description: Cost to hold average inventory of alternative material based on lead time.

formulas.label: Annual Quality Impact Cost
formulas.expression: CASE quality_impact WHEN 'none' THEN 0 WHEN 'low' THEN annual_material_cost_alternative * 0.005 WHEN 'medium' THEN annual_material_cost_alternative * 0.015 WHEN 'high' THEN annual_material_cost_alternative * 0.03 END
formulas.description: Estimated rework or quality cost due to material change.

formulas.label: Total Annual Cost (Current)
formulas.description: Sum of all annual costs for current material.

formulas.label: Total Annual Cost (Alternative)
formulas.expression: annual_material_cost_alternative + scrap_cost_alternative + logistics_cost_alternative_annual + inventory_cost_alternative + quality_impact_cost + currency_risk_cost + (changeover_cost / 1)
formulas.description: Sum of all annual costs for alternative material including one-time changeover.

formulas.label: Total Annual Savings
formulas.description: Net annual savings (positive = savings, negative = loss) from switching to alternative.

primary.label: Total Annual Savings
primary.description: Primary result: net annual cost impact of material replacement.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Hidden Quality Downtime
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unplanned downtime due to material-related quality issues not captured in scrap rate.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Hidden Obsolescence Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Risk of alternative material becoming obsolete or discontinued.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Hidden Training Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost to train operators and maintenance on new material handling.

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate volume discount
suggestedActions.description: If savings are marginal, negotiate a lower price for alternative material based on annual volume.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize logistics for alternative
suggestedActions.description: Explore consolidated shipping or local warehousing to reduce logistics cost.

suggestedActions.label: Run a pilot quality trial
suggestedActions.description: Conduct a small-scale trial to validate scrap rate and downstream quality impact.

suggestedActions.label: Supplier development program
suggestedActions.description: Work with alternative supplier to improve on-time delivery and reliability.

suggestedActions.label: Implement currency hedging
suggestedActions.description: If currency risk is high, consider forward contracts to lock in exchange rates.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Savings
dataConfidenceAdjusted.expression: total_annual_savings * (1 - (0.1 * (scrap_rate_alternative / 100) + 0.05 * (currency_risk / 100) + 0.1 * (CASE supplier_reliability WHEN 'excellent' THEN 0 WHEN 'good' THEN 0.05 WHEN 'fair' THEN 0.1 WHEN 'poor' THEN 0.2 END)))
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Savings adjusted for data uncertainty based on scrap rate, currency risk, and supplier reliability.
